title: Lesson 179: (Grammar) - until (a time); till; to; up to; to (a place); as ...

intro_cards.title: Extent Marker: まで
intro_cards.body:
まで means 'until' (time) or 'up to / as far as' (place/extent).

1. Time ('until'):
• 6時まで働きます。(I work until 6.)
• 明日まで待ってください。(Please wait until tomorrow.)

2. Place / distance:
• 駅まで歩きます。(I'll walk to the station.)
• ここまで来てください。(Please come this far.)

から〜まで = from ~ to ~:
• 月曜日から金曜日まで (from Monday to Friday)
• 朝から晩まで (from morning to night)
